authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 255083, "Coyote Creek", Stream, CA, Santa Clara/Alameda Cos.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":255083,"gaz_name":"Coyote Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","state_alpha":"CA"} — mouth point lon -122.0489, lat 37.4572; correcting the file's prior coordinate (-121.8155, 37.3222, downtown San Jose), ~25.5km from the true mouth.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(34) — Coyote Creek (Santa Clara Co.)
sources.quotedText: (34) Coyote Creek (Santa Clara Co.). Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15. Only artificial lures and barbless hooks may be used. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40 — footnote definition of hatchery trout/steelhead (**)
sources.quotedText: Hatchery trout or steelhead in anadromous waters are those showing a healed adipose fin clip (adipose fin is absent). Unless otherwise provided, all other trout and steelhead must be immediately released. Wild trout or steelhead are those not showing a healed adipose fin clip (adipose fin is present).

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
About Coyote Creek | Keep Coyote Creek Beautiful
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

regulations.humanSummary: Open the last Saturday in April through November 15 on Coyote Creek.
regulations.verbatimText: Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures and barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures and barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Applies only to hatchery (adipose-fin-clipped) trout or steelhead; combined daily bag of 2, combined possession limit of 4.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily bag; 4 in possession.
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Only hatchery trout or steelhead showing a healed adipose fin clip may be retained; wild (unclipped) trout or steelhead must be released immediately.

regulations.humanSummary: Wild (unclipped) trout and steelhead must be released immediately; only adipose-fin-clipped hatchery fish count toward the bag.
regulations.verbatimText: Hatchery trout or steelhead in anadromous waters are those showing a healed adipose fin clip (adipose fin is absent). Unless otherwise provided, all other trout and steelhead must be immediately released. Wild trout or steelhead are those not showing a healed adipose fin clip (adipose fin is present).

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
